name: ari-ide-advisor
description: Privacy-first IDE context bridge for the Ari engineering mentor.

commands.title: Ari: Pair IDE Advisor from Connection File

ari.ideBridge.endpoint.description: Loopback endpoint shown by the Ari desktop pairing screen.

ari.ideBridge.sessionId.description: Short-lived pairing session ID. The token is kept in VS Code SecretStorage.

ari.ideBridge.autoConnect.description: Reconnect to a previously paired local Ari instance when VS Code starts.

ari.ideBridge.shareActiveFile.description: Share active file URI, language and version with Ari.

ari.ideBridge.shareSelection.description: Share the current editor selection with Ari. Requires active-file sharing.

ari.ideBridge.shareUnsavedBuffers.description: Share the complete active document buffer with Ari, including saved files. Requires active-file sharing.

ari.ideBridge.shareDiagnostics.description: Share VS Code diagnostics with Ari.

ari.ideBridge.shareGitStatus.description: Share branch and changed-file metadata with Ari.

ari.ideBridge.shareTestResults.description: Allow test adapters to publish test outcomes to Ari.

ari.ideBridge.debounceMs.description: Delay before publishing a snapshot after editor changes.

ari.ideBridge.maxBufferChars.description: Maximum selection or unsaved-buffer characters sent in one snapshot.
